  4. Import Export Code (IEC) Registration

Import Export Code (IEC) Registration in Coimbatore

IEC registration and modification for Coimbatore exporters and importers, linked correctly to PAN and bank details for smooth customs and bank processing.

No shipment clears customs, and no export payment clears a bank, without a valid IEC linked correctly to your PAN and bank account. We register and modify Import Export Codes for Coimbatore's textile exporters, engineering goods manufacturers, and trading businesses, making sure the linkage to your bank's AD code and GST details is clean from the first shipment.

IEC and the export incentive schemes it unlocks

A valid, updated IEC is the entry ticket to India’s main export incentive mechanisms, and Coimbatore exporters — particularly in the textile and engineering goods trade adjoining Tirupur’s export ecosystem — routinely leave money on the table simply by not tracking eligibility carefully. RoDTEP (Remission of Duties and Taxes on Exported Products) refunds embedded taxes and duties not otherwise rebated through GST — state taxes on fuel, electricity duty, mandi tax, and similar costs baked into the price of exported goods — as a percentage of FOB value, credited as transferable scrips via the ICEGATE system. Duty drawback separately refunds customs duty paid on imported inputs used in export production. Both schemes require the shipping bill to correctly declare intent to claim (RoDTEP specifically needs to be claimed at the time of filing, not retrospectively), and both depend on the IEC, GSTIN, and bank AD code all being consistently linked — a mismatch anywhere in that chain is one of the more common reasons a legitimately eligible claim gets held up or rejected.

What’s included

  • New IEC registration on the DGFT portal
  • IEC modification for address, bank, or ownership changes
  • Bank AD code registration coordination at the port of export/import
  • Linkage verification with GST and PAN records
  • Annual IEC updation compliance (mandatory even with no changes)
  • Advisory on export incentive schemes linked to IEC (RoDTEP, duty drawback eligibility)

Our process

  1. Eligibility and data check — We confirm PAN, business constitution, and bank details are consistent across your GST registration and proposed IEC application, since discrepancies are the leading cause of DGFT queries.
  2. Application filing — The IEC application is filed online on the DGFT portal with Digital Signature Certificate authentication.
  3. Bank details linkage — Your bank account is linked for the IEC, which is a precondition for both receiving export proceeds and for the bank's own AD code registration at the port.
  4. Certificate issuance — The IEC is typically issued within 1-2 working days of a complete, error-free application.
  5. Annual updation reminder — We track the mandatory annual updation window (April-June each year) so your IEC doesn't get deactivated for non-updation, even if nothing has changed.

Common mistakes that delay Coimbatore export/import shipments

The most disruptive mistake is missing the annual IEC updation window and only discovering the deactivation when a shipment is already sitting at port, unable to clear — this is entirely avoidable with a tracked reminder, which is why we treat it as a standing compliance item rather than a one-time task. We also regularly see PAN and bank detail mismatches between the IEC record and the GST registration, which surfaces during export refund processing rather than at IEC issuance itself, since the two systems aren’t always cross-checked in real time when the underlying details drift apart over the years. New exporters occasionally also miss that RoDTEP has to be actively claimed at the shipping bill stage — it isn’t automatic, and a shipping bill filed without the RoDTEP declaration generally can’t claim the benefit retroactively for that shipment.

Documents you’ll need

  • PAN of the business/individual
  • Business address proof
  • Bank account details (cancelled cheque or bank certificate)
  • Digital Signature Certificate
  • GST registration certificate, if applicable
  • Partnership deed / MOA-AOA / LLP agreement, as applicable

IEC registration across Coimbatore’s trade landscape

Coimbatore sits directly adjacent to Tirupur’s textile export corridor, and a meaningful share of the region’s spinning mills and textile processing units on Tirupur Road and Avinashi Road export directly or supply into Tirupur’s garment export chain — for these businesses, RoDTEP and duty drawback aren’t optional extras but a real component of margin, worth actively managing rather than claiming inconsistently. Engineering goods and auto-component manufacturers in Singanallur and Ganapathy increasingly export to Southeast Asian and Middle Eastern markets, and typically need both export IEC benefits and import-side IEC use for machinery or component imports, so we handle both directions of the same code together. IT and services firms in Saravanampatti technically fall under IEC requirements too where cross-border service supply is involved, though in practice their DGFT-linked activity is lighter than manufacturers’ — the more material compliance question for them is usually the GST LUT and export documentation covered under our GST Refund Assistance service, working alongside IEC rather than instead of it.

Frequently asked questions about Import Export Code (IEC) Registration

Is IEC mandatory for every export or import transaction?

Yes, IEC is mandatory for any commercial import or export of goods or services, with a short list of exemptions (like personal use imports or certain government departments); customs and banks will not process shipment/payment without it.

What happens if I don't complete the annual IEC updation?

IEC not updated during the annual window (typically April-June) risks being deactivated by DGFT, which can freeze your ability to file shipping bills or receive export payments until it's reactivated.

Can one PAN have only one IEC?

Yes, IEC is now linked one-to-one with PAN — a business or individual can hold only a single IEC, which then covers all their import-export activity.

How does IEC connect to GST for export transactions?

Your IEC and GSTIN need to be consistently linked in shipping bill filings for export refund claims (like IGST refund on exports) to process smoothly at customs — mismatches here are a common cause of refund delays.

Do I need a separate IEC for each product category I export?

No, a single IEC covers all product categories and all import-export activity under that PAN; you don't need multiple IECs for different goods.

How long does it take to get a new IEC?

With complete documentation and DSC authentication, IEC is typically issued within 1-2 working days on the DGFT portal.

Does IEC registration help with export incentive schemes like RoDTEP?

Yes, a valid, updated IEC is a precondition for claiming benefits under schemes like RoDTEP and for duty drawback eligibility, both of which we factor into the advisory once your IEC is active.
